programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Gabby refuses to mate his stallion with Roys horse When his horse runs away from the house he blames Roy and gets him jailed

programme.title: The Carson City Kid
programme.desc: The Carson City Kid Roy Rogers stops stagecoaches traveling between Wild West mining towns searching their mail sacks for letters addressed to Morgan Reynolds the man who killed his brother Discovering that Reynolds operates a saloon under the name Lee Jessup Bob Steele the Kid takes a job as the saloons bouncer While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison Pauline Moore the Kid discovers a swindled miner Noah Beery Jr who claims to be the Carson City Kid

programme.title: In Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: Kentucky loses his horse in a rigged horse race and gets framed for the murder of a stagecoach driver

programme.title: Lawmen
programme.desc: While celebrating in an inebriated state a group of cattlemen inadvertently kill an old man in Bannock The righteous marshal of the town vows to punish them

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man signs up people to a magazine subscription showing them his Congressional Medal of Honor to prove his honesty However it is a scam as there is no magazine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A pretty airline stewardess badly injures Kimble in a traffic accident and in his delirium he admits who he is and she helps him In turn Kimble helps her realize the married man shes dating is not right for her

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: While performing experimental underwater research utilizing infra-red light a diver goes missing

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike takes on a dangerous spy mission while vacationing in the Caribbean

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Gen Savage is suspected by Scotland Yard of killing a pretty model in her flat and even he cannot remember all the events of that night

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Julia attempts to save herself by hiding her notebook in the grandfather clock After Carolyn snaps at Julia Elizabeth insists she apologize

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Attorney Tony Peterson arrives at Collinwood to berate Roger so Julia accompanies him back to his office and begs him to lock up her notebook

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Carolyn attempts to cozy up to Tony to get the notebook back Barnabas uses a murder weapon and magic to drive Julia to the brink of madness

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Julia is so tormented by Daves ghost that Carolyn and Barnabas fear she might do something rash

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Abilene Town

programme.title: The Last Command
programme.desc: In this fact-based film legendary Texan Jim Bowie Sterling Hayden attempts to come to a nonviolent compromise with Mexican President Santa Anna J Carrol Naish but the negotiations soon turn sour Consuelo de Quesada Anna Maria Alberghetti a Mexican girl with close ties to Jim then warns him that Santa Anas men are planning to invade So Jim Davy Crockett Arthur Hunnicutt and a tiny crew of courageous Texans hide out in an abandoned mission awaiting the violent confrontation

programme.title: Howling III
programme.desc: A female werewolf runs away from her family and falls in love with a man who works in the movie business while a sociologist searches for proof of the werewolves existence

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to No More Mr Nice Guy the twin daughters of the cop who killed Freddy find that whenever one is attacked by the man of their dreams the other is wounded So the sisters team up to try to get Freddy out of their dreams for good

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The year is 1918 During World War I somewhere in France its the 49th day of continuous battle on the front lines Lieutenant Martin Kalthrob doesnt want to be in the army anymore and asks his father General Kalthrob for a discharge His father refuses but says he will transfer him to the rear if he leads a patrol to the German lines and fix the broken communication line When he proves himself to be a coward his father orders a court martial with penalty of death by firing squad

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Small-time crook Mickey aspires to work as a runner for drug lord Joey Stregga To achieve this aim Mickey sets up his innocent ex-hooker girlfriend Pearl on a date with Stregga but pays heavily for betraying her pure love for him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Alamo Joe catches up with Eric in a small town jail then attempts to grill him about his lycanthropy Eric tells him he still has hopes for a cure but later turns into a werewolf escapes from the jail and Alamo Joe is forced to kill him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: With Eric apparently dead in the morgue Alamo Joe recovers from his wounds in the hospital and reevaluates his life decisions He fears he was bitten and will now become a werewolf Eric returns from the dead and escapes from the morgue

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A known pornographer being investigated by Nick kills Nicks snitch when he finds a wire on him Will Nick have to commit perjury to convict him

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: An unscrupulous faith healer discovers a powerful glove that turns him into a killer

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer volunteers to train a German Shepherd named Killer intended for sentry duty but turns Killer into a pussycat

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job Of course what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find a headhunter tribes totem pole on the island The head on the top of it bears an uncanny resemblance to Gilligan--which comes in handy when the headhunters return to the island

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After Mary Ann watches Ginger perform on the island she hits her head giving her amnesia thus believing that she is Ginger Grant Everyone plays along until Mary Ann cant act or dance and her memory comes back

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: In hopes of staving off foreclosure Amos courts the elderly spinster holding the mortgage on the McCoy farm

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When 16-year-old Hassie and her boyfriend Jerry impetuously announce their engagement Grandpas apparent approval causes considerable consternation among Luke Kate and Jerrys fastidious grandfather J Luther Medwick

programme.title: Smart 422
programme.desc: Smart 422

programme.title: Smart 507
programme.desc: Smart 507

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ wrecks his truck and suffers amnesia As he struggles to remember who he is and why two men are attempting to kill him he falls in love with Gypsy and works the bumper car pavilion of her uncles carnival

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed volunteers to be shot into outer space

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Through Rogers trickery Ed believes that he has a shameful heritage so he runs away from home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is stymied over how to rescue a captured member of the underground until a potential diversion appears in the form of an old WWI buddy of Sgt Schultz

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany so he creates a health spa

programme.title: Mchale 302
programme.desc: Mchale 302

programme.title: Mchale 233
programme.desc: Mchale 233

programme.title: The Scarlet and The Black
programme.desc: Vatican efforts led by Monsignor Hugh OFlaherty to save Allied POWs and downed Allied airmen as the Nazis invade Rome

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Captain Newman MD
programme.desc: In 1944 an Army doctor is in charge of a neuropsychiatric ward at an Army Air Corps hospital in Arizona and he must deal with a variety of tough cases

programme.title: American Guerrilla In The Philippines
programme.desc: American soldiers stranded in the Philippines after the Japanese invasion form guerrilla bands to fight back

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Millionaire CJ Holmes is determined not to allow his daughter Suzy to marry farmer Fred Andrews When Suzy appeals to the Dukes for help CJs henchmen kidnap Uncle Jesse in a last-ditch effort to stop the wedding Jesse decides to teach the millionaire a lesson about the dedication and self-sacrifice of farmers

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Joshua Doors is running his own technology development company and Renee goes undercover to find out what is going on An artificial intelligence program of the Taelons that controls human minds seems to be acting on its own

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Wanting to set off a tribal war within the human race the aliens attempt to detonate a nuclear bomb at a US-Soviet disarmament summit

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane has created a poison engineered to specifically target Swamp Things genetic code Ann has discovered a method of temporarily changing Alec back to human form

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Temporally displaced Confederate Civil War soldiers appear in the swamp one of whom is a previous residence of Wills house Will helps the man to discover the mystery behind his wartime disappearance and make peace with his past so he can pass on

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: While unconscious and connected to an experimental brain machine Koenig dreams that he and his friends are on the way home Upon awakening everyone appears to be hideous monsters

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne meets a sheriff he admires and a town he likes so he decides to stick around When he finds he has an agenda too that involves a pretty woman and some easy money he has second thoughts and a decision to make

programme.title: Young 310
programme.desc: Young 310

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A New York City detective comes to San Francisco in search of a cop killers

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF is tasked with defamation of Janos Karq a dangerous politician from the Eastern Block who intends to start a war with the West Joseph Baresh will be placed in the military prison Lubjanka where his testimonies shall implicate Karq

programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimbles David Janssen anti-smog crusading friend Laurence Naismith has him deliver a package secretly containing a bomb to a polluting factory unaware that children are there

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As Heath settles into life in the Valley his authority is questioned by the men employed to aid him in a huge cattle drive which is further complicated by the arrival of a former general with plans of his own

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 23 filmed at the Subway Soccer Center in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle in the cage. Cody Clarke vs. Matthew Norman; Phil Towler vs. Ryan Shanahan; Jesse Arnett vs. Mike O'Neill; Daymon Miller vs. Beau Bentley.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Misha Cirkunov at HK41

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: How does one begin to return to their sport after an injury? After the Fight looks at the physical and mental struggles of fighters after a fight and how they begin to recover. Featuring Justin Grey

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football
